0.text: Peribronchial thickening in the middle and lower lobes of the right lung

1.text: Diffuse ground glass densities in the middle and lower lobes of the right lung

2.text: Acinar nodular infiltrates in the peribronchovascular area of the right lung

3.text: Consolidations with air bronchograms in the peripheral lung zone in the middle lobe of the right lung

4.text: Consolidations with air bronchograms in the basal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

5.text: Ground glass areas in the inferior lingular and basal segments of the left lung

6.text: Fibrotic and atelectatic changes in the lower lobe basal segment of the left lung
